programme.title: Caught In The Act: Unfaithful
programme.sub-title: He Proposed to Both of Us
programme.desc: Den schweiziska modellen Leila blev tagen med storm av West for fyra år sen. Men på sistone har West betett sig annorlunda, så Leila tror att hennes dromkille kan vara otrogen mot henne.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Angelina och Deena har gravt ner stridsyxan och familjesemestern kan borja på riktigt. Men nar Jenni kommer forandras allt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Ganget inleder med att åka till Las Vegas. Efter festandet i Syndernas Stad åker de tillbaka osterut och firar i Atlantic City, innan de slår sig ner vid kusten over sommaren for att återuppleva fornstora dagar.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Dr Drew medlar i bråket mellan Angelina och Jenni. Laget forvarras nar Deena får veta att hennes samtal med Mike inte var så privat. Mike och Lauren får sitt livs gladaste besked.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: RSVP planerar Angelinas nya brollop. Farbror Nino ar vigselforrattare och Vinny ska hålla tal. Vad kan gå fel?

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Les chefs televises Aldo Zilli et Ching He-Huang s’affrontent lors de ce Road Trip à travers le sud-est de l’Angleterre, accompagnes des experts Natasha Raskin et Paul Laidlaw.Aldo mise sur une bague en or malgre les conseils des experts, tandis que Ching espère que des antiquites d’origine orientale feront un beau score aux enchères dans le nord de Londres.En chemin, Aldo fait une halte pour rencontrer Jill, une doyenne de 200 ans qui fournissait autrefois la population en farine. De son côte, l’amoureuse des animaux Ching decouvre l’histoire d’un homme qui, au XIXe siècle, a risque le ridicule et la ruine pour proteger le betail.

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In this episode, the two candidates Stephany Mora and Harleena will compete on an imposed theme. Today, the theme is vineyards. They will have one hour to take the best picture possible. Let’s see who will win.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, nous nous rendons dans la banlieue Sud de Paris. C’est dans un quartier tranquille que l’artiste Elias Crespin se rend chaque matin pour rejoindre son studio. L’artiste d’origine venezuelienne, y a etabli ses quartiers depuis près de 5 ans et y façonnent ses creations un peu particulières. Ses sculptures sont composees de figures geometriques simples, des lignes, triangles, carres ou cercles, qui flottent dans l’espace suspendus à des fils presque invisibles.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Prussian painter, Caspar David Friedrich. You will discover his labour with The Wanderer above the mists, Greifswald port or the Lone tree.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Spanish painter, Francisco de Goya. You will discover his labour with Lunch in the Countryside, The third of may 1808 or the Cannibals.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Canaletto and the Art of Venice
programme.desc: Canaletto et l’art de Venise, un voyage en immersion dans la vie et l’art du celèbre peintre de Venise. Aucun artiste n’a su mieux capturer l’essence et le charme de cette ville que Giovanni Antonio Canal, plus connu sous le nom de Canaletto. La remarquable collection regroupe plus de 200 tableaux, dessins et eaux-fortes nous permet de partir à la decouverte du talent artistique de Canaletto, de ses contemporains et de la ville qu’il a su reproduire avec genie. Le film ouvre egalement les portes de deux residences royales officielles, Buckingham Palace et le château de Windsor, pour nous en apprendre plus sur l’artiste et sur Joseph Smith, l’homme qui a fait decouvrir Canaletto à la Grande-Bretagne.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Paul Serusier spent his entire summer of 1888 painting with Paul Gauguin in Pont-Aven, Brittany. This master of colour gave invaluable advice to the young Serusier, who was part of the new generation of painters known as the Post-Impressionists. The Impressionists favoured the visual sensation of the motif, but they had not broken with the illusionist rendering of nature.

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: The school board of Fort de France in Martinique is the only contemporary architecture building built in Martinique but also the only administrative building naturally ventilated by the trade winds. Between the challenges of natural ventilation and the imperatives of an architectural approach, Christian Hauvette has designed a fully open building where the boundary between inside and outside disappears.

programme.title: Little Sketches
programme.desc: In 64 fun episodes, Gia-Haï Phan teaches you all the sketching techniques you need.

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Licône de la pop et actrice Claire Grogan retrouve son compatriote de Glasgow, l’acteur Alex Norton de Taggart, pour une quete de tresors antiques lucratifs. Anita Manning et Paul Laidlaw sont là pour leur prodiguer leurs conseils d’experts.Anita et Alex se retrouvent embarques dans un Boat Trip dantiquites, evoquant leurs souvenirs denfance sur le Clyde. Pendant ce temps, Claire et Paul decouvrent de près à quoi ressemblait le château de Stirling au XVIe siècle.Le resultat de la vente aux enchères à Ayr dependra d’une dame nue.

programme.title: Secret treasures
programme.desc: The National Assembly, the Thiers Library or the Custodia Foundation, when you think of these important places in the history of France, you dont think that they can contain real treasures. We will prove you are wrong! Experts, historians, will guide us and make us discover the secrets of these incredible places.

programme.title: Getting Frank Gehry
programme.desc: Drawing on a lifes work defined by controversial and ground-breaking ideas, the worlds greatest architect has inaugurated his first Australian building - and debate still rages over whether it is eyesore or icon. Our film follows the drama as Gehry’s vision for this commission is realized. Through the construction of this building, we examine his challenging work over a period of forty years.

programme.title: Masterpiece
programme.desc: ‘Girl in a White Kimono’ is a painting from Breitners famous Kimono Girl series. As a preliminary study for his paintings, he used photographs of his model (Geesje Kwak) in kimono. To get as close as possible to the creative process of Breitner, the team will take a photo with Breitners original camera. The camera is fantastic museum piece in the safekeeping of Leiden University. It turns out to be a complicated chemical process with glass negatives and slow shutter speeds. Charlotte finds out that she needs a certain medium to be able to complete the reconstruction properly. Michel investigates and ends up in Cambridge; looking for a recipe in the archives of an old paint shop.

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.desc: Private Tour takes you to discover the exhibition "Architects furniture, 1960-2020" at the Cite de lArchitecture et du Patrimoine in Paris. Why do architects still design furniture today, while designers have taken over the real estate market, lighting...? You will have the answer in this private tour and you will discover furniture of architects such as Nemo.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Le musee du Petit-Palais a ete construit à Paris pour l’Exposition Universelle de 1900, en meme temps que le Grand Palais. La collection comprend des chefs-d’œuvre comme le Portrait de l’artiste en costume oriental de Rembrandt, le Port de mer au soleil couchant du Lorrain ou les Trois baigneuses de Cezanne. C’est egalement là qu’on peut admirer le fameux et très sensuel Sommeil de Gustave Courbet. Bonne visite !

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: The school board of Fort de France in Martinique is the only contemporary architecture building built in Martinique but also the only administrative building naturally ventilated by the trade winds. Between the challenges of natural ventilation and the imperatives of an architectural approach, Christian Hauvette has designed a fully open building where the boundary between inside and outside disappears.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Narrated by Gillian Anderson, this episode of Exhibition on Screen follows the footsteps of French artists such as Renoir and Monet, the American Impressionist movement forged its own path. Painted over a period of 40 years, these paintings reveal the United States both as a nation and as a creative breeding ground. The history of this movement is closely linked to the love of gardens and the desire to preserve nature in a country undergoing rapid urbanization. This enchanting journey through workshops, gardens and famous sites in the USA, UK and France is a feast for the eyes.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Pour les 500 ans de la mort de Raphaël, une grande exposition a ouvert ses portes à Rome. « Exhibition on Screen » a eu un accès exclusif à cet evenement, qui reunit plus de 200 œuvres majeures de ce maître de la Renaissance. Le film part à la decouverte de l’exposition et eclaire d’une nouvelle lumière le travail de cet artiste souvent incompris ou, au contraire, idealise.

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In each episode of the decisive moment, we welcome a photographer whom we have asked to select three photos that have marked their life and their career. Whether they are reporters, portraitists or fashion photographers, they all have the same passion and will share it with us.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In each episode of the decisive moment, we welcome a photographer whom we have asked to select three photos that have marked their life and their career. Whether they are reporters, portraitists or fashion photographers, they all have the same passion and will share it with us.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Licône de la pop et actrice Claire Grogan retrouve son compatriote de Glasgow, l’acteur Alex Norton de Taggart, pour une quete de tresors antiques lucratifs. Anita Manning et Paul Laidlaw sont là pour leur prodiguer leurs conseils d’experts.Anita et Alex se retrouvent embarques dans un Boat Trip dantiquites, evoquant leurs souvenirs denfance sur le Clyde. Pendant ce temps, Claire et Paul decouvrent de près à quoi ressemblait le château de Stirling au XVIe siècle.Le resultat de la vente aux enchères à Ayr dependra d’une dame nue.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Deux stars des annees 70, le crooner cool Tony Christie et la royaute pop Jimmy Osmond, sont accompagnes des experts Catherine Southon et Margie Cooper. Partant de la ville de Loughborough, dans le Leicestershire, ils se dirigent vers une vente aux enchères à Stoke-on-Trent, dans le Staffordshire.Tony profite dune visite à Coalbrookdale, le lieu où des techniques innovantes ont ete developpees, marquant le debut de la revolution industrielle. De son côte, le passionne de voitures Jimmy soffre un tour sur le circuit historique de Donington.La grande finale aux enchères comprend un moment de chant en groupe unique en son genre. Mais quel maestro musical remportera la victoire ?

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Vincent Van Gogh : une nouvelle façon de voir
programme.desc: La vie de Vincent van Gogh reste entouree de mystère : folie, maladie, suicide, les ingredients pour creer un mythe sont tous reunis. Beneficiant d’un accès complet et sans precedent aux tresors du Van Gogh Museum d’Amsterdam, ce documentaire met en lumière à la fois l’un des artistes preferes du monde et la collection riche et unique du musee. Decouvrez ces merveilleux chefs-d’œuvre sur grand ecran pendant que quelques invites y compris les conservateurs de renommee mondiale et des historiens de l’art offrent leurs interpretations et des explications sur le travail de Van Gogh.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Hopper’s work is the most recognisable art in America – popular, praised, and mysterious. Countless painters, photographers, filmmakers and musicians have been influenced by his art – but who was he, and how did a struggling illustrator create such a bounty of notable work?This new film takes a deep look into Hopper’s art, his life, and his relationships. From his early career as an illustrator; his wife giving up her own promising art career to be his manager; his critical and commercial acclaim; and in his own words – this film explores the enigmatic personality behind the brush….

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: David Hockney à la Royal Academy of Arts
programme.desc: David Hockney, generalement considere comme l’un des artistes britanniques les plus populaires, connaît un succès mondial grâce à ses expositions à Londres, New York, Paris et ailleurs qui attirent des millions de spectateurs. Devenu recemment octogenaire, Hockney ne semble pas avoir l’intention de lever le pied ni de perdre son audace legendaire. Ce film revèle des interviews intimes et inedites et se concentre sur deux expositions à succès ayant eu lieu en 2012 et 2016 à la Royal Academy of Arts Londres. Le realisateur Phil Grabsky a beneficie d’un accès privilegie pour celebrer sur grand ecran ce genie creatif du XXIe siècle.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Without Camille Pissarro, there is no Impressionist movement. He is rightfully known as the father of Impressionism.It was a dramatic path that Pissarro followed, and throughout it all he wrote extensively to his family. It is through these intimate and revealing letters that this gripping film reveals Pissarro’s life and work.Born in the West Indies, Pissarro found his passion in paint as a young man in Paris, and by the age of 43 had corralled a group of enthusiastic artists into a new collective. Their first show was scorned by the critics, but the group had acquired a new name: the Impressionists. For the next 40 years Pissarro was the driving force behind what has today become the world’s favourite artistic movement.The Ashmolean Museum has a long tradition of excellence. As the UK’s first ever public museum (it opened its doors in May 1683) it houses a wonderfully rich collection, including the remarkable Pissarro archive. With exclusive access to most extensive archive of.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Degas : une passion de la perfection
programme.desc: Exhibition on screen nous emmène à travers les rues de Paris puis au cœur d’une superbe exposition au Fitzwilliam Museum de Cambridge, dont l’impressionnante collection d’œuvres de Degas est la plus representative de Grande-Bretagne. Ayant beneficie d’un accès exclusif à une grande variete d’œuvres rares, le film raconte l’histoire fascinante de la quete de perfection de Degas à travers l’experimentation de nouvelles techniques et les leçons apprises en etudiant les grands maîtres.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Goya : visions de chair et de sang
programme.desc: Francisco Goya, considere comme le fondateur de l’art moderne, est l’artiste espagnol le plus acclame. En plus d’observer avec talent la vie et le passe mouvemente de l’Espagne, c’est un portraitiste doue et un commentateur social par excellence. Avec Goya, l’art du portrait atteint de nouveaux sommets. Cette exposition majeure de la National Gallery de Londres remet son genie en lumière. À travers une formidable collection d’oeuvres uniques et de lettres de Goya, nous analysons l’homme lui-meme et le monde qu’il peignait.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Named Euphrosyne, Thalia and Aglaia, they embody mirth, abundance and splendour. They are the Three Graces, daughters of Jupiter and companions of Venus. A very prized subject as early as the Renaissance, it allowed for a triple representation of the female nude in all its ideal beauty. Observe their grace in the painting by Raphael and the delicacy of their veils in Botticelli’s “La Primavera” or in a magnificent work by Cranach recently acquired by the Louvre Museum. Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Leonard De Vinci est le peintre Italien de la renaissance le plus celèbre. Il possède un talent inegalable (peintre, sculpteur, architecte, ingenieur, urbaniste, mathematicien, botaniste, philosophe, inventeur,…) Il a considerablement influence l’histoire de l’art. Son usage de la technique Sfumato et du clair-obscur son encore etudie aujourd’hui. La « Mona Lisa » et « La Cène » expose au Louvre et dans leglise Santa Maria delle Grazie qui apparaissent dans cet episode font partie de ses peintures les plus renomme, admire et parodie à travers le monde.Bonne visite !

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Deux legendes de la comedie britannique, Ronni Ancona et Jan Ravens, sont accompagnees des antiquaires Phil Serrell et James Braxton pour ce Road Trip. Partant de la ville de Redcar, dans le North Yorkshire, ils se dirigent vers une vente aux enchères à Stockport, dans le Cheshire.Jan se laisse emporter et depense tout son budget, tandis que Ronni se regale dune paire de bottes en verre très kitsch.Lors dun detour, Jan decouvre pourquoi les habitants de Hartlepool pensaient quun singe etait un Français, et Ronni reste bouche bee lorsque Braxton enlève ses vetements. Sacre moment !

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In this episode, the two candidates of the day, Thibaud Poirier and Antoine Guillou, will have one hour to realize their photo session. They will have to take the best possible photos on the imposed theme of architecture in the 12th district of Paris, and then they will have 30 minutes to edit their photos.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, nous irons à la rencontre de l’artiste Erik Desmazières. Il est l’un des artistes graveurs les plus connus en France, et il est expose à travers le monde. Il a apporte à cette discipline un peu desuète, une forme de modernite, grâce à ses paysages fantastiques imbibes de science-fiction remarques tout de suite par les collectionneurs. Membre de l’Academie Française des Beaux-Arts depuis 2008, Erik Desmazières s’est tourne ces dernières annees vers des paysages realistes.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Flemish painter, Pierre Paul Rubens. You will discover his labour with Samson and Dalilah, The four philosophers or The education of Marie de’Medici.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Édouard Vuillard. You will discover his labour with Sleep, The Piano or Portrait de madame Henri Vaquez.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: En juin 2017, une grande exposition a ouvert à Paris au musee d’Orsay. Pour la première fois, cette exposition a reuni tous les portraits de Cezanne. Cela a ete l’occasion d’analyser l’œuvre de Cezanne à l’aide d’experts internationaux et de parcourir les salles de la National Portrait Gallery de Londres et de la National Gallery of Art de Washington.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Discover or re-discover the masterpieces of the greatest painters of history through our documentary series Within The Frame. From impressionists to surrealists, from Leonard Da Vinci to Paul Cezanne, every episode will immerge you into a virtual tour of a paintings collection. You will see the most impressive paintings ever made and wont miss a single detail.

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: Built in 1926, the Bauhaus in Dessau remains Walter Gropiuss major work. One of the most famous buildings of 20th century architecture. Not only architect of the Bauhaus, he is also the director of this "School of Creation": the Bauhaus, both patron and client. It is the separate needs of the school that determine the design of the buildings, which are connected to each other. To each space its coherence, its own existence. Gropius opts for a nesting system: he designs an asymmetrical building, giving it a floating character, playing on different masses and different heights, advancing into space. As if in extension. The desire for transparency is omnipresent. The curtain wall of glass that clings to the three floors of the main parallelepiped is the most accomplished mark of it. The interior decoration is designed and built by the Bauhaus students. It is a total architecture for Gropius. Rationalizing construction, producing more economical and functional housing will remain the a.

programme.title: Little Sketches
programme.desc: In 64 fun episodes, Gia-Haï Phan teaches you all the sketching techniques you need.

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Les animatrices vedettes Nicki Chapman et Jules Hudson sechappent à la campagne pour partir à la chasse aux antiquites avec Natasha Raskin et Phillip Serrell. Cest une bataille filles contre garçons, chaque equipe disposant de 400 £. Le voyage commence à Wormsley, dans le Herefordshire, puis les deux equipes se dirigent vers le pays de Galles et lOxfordshire, avant de finir à North Finchley, à Londres, pour une vente aux enchères.En chemin, les filles rencontrent un fabricant de sabots qui sculpte les chaussures à la main. Pendant ce temps, les garçons se rendent au Herefordshire Light Infantry Museum pour en apprendre davantage sur l’implication du regiment à Gallipoli.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Hopper’s work is the most recognisable art in America – popular, praised, and mysterious. Countless painters, photographers, filmmakers and musicians have been influenced by his art – but who was he, and how did a struggling illustrator create such a bounty of notable work?This new film takes a deep look into Hopper’s art, his life, and his relationships. From his early career as an illustrator; his wife giving up her own promising art career to be his manager; his critical and commercial acclaim; and in his own words – this film explores the enigmatic personality behind the brush….

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: David Hockney à la Royal Academy of Arts
programme.desc: David Hockney, generalement considere comme l’un des artistes britanniques les plus populaires, connaît un succès mondial grâce à ses expositions à Londres, New York, Paris et ailleurs qui attirent des millions de spectateurs. Devenu recemment octogenaire, Hockney ne semble pas avoir l’intention de lever le pied ni de perdre son audace legendaire. Ce film revèle des interviews intimes et inedites et se concentre sur deux expositions à succès ayant eu lieu en 2012 et 2016 à la Royal Academy of Arts Londres. Le realisateur Phil Grabsky a beneficie d’un accès privilegie pour celebrer sur grand ecran ce genie creatif du XXIe siècle.

programme.title: Masterpiece
programme.desc: Rembrandt van Rijn a realise ce tableau à lâge de 24 ans. Il sagit dun tableau incroyablement complexe dans lequel tout son talent est reuni : Leffet enchanteur entre lesquisse et le petit detail. Mais aussi lexpression de tous les differents materiaux tels que le velours, le metal, le corail rouge et la roche. Michel van de Laar, membre de lequipe, a restaure des œuvres de Rembrandt dans le passe et a decouvert que la peinture cachait quelque chose de special : Un cheveu de Rembrandt. Lors de la reconstruction, un cheveu sera egalement remis en place. Et pas nimporte quel cheveu : une recherche passionnante mène à un descendant de Rembrandt.

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.sub-title: A landscape of excellence, three figures of French architecture
programme.desc: Private Tour takes you to discover the exhibition "A landscape of excellence, three figures of French architecture" at the Cite de lArchitecture and du Patrimoine in Paris. This exhibition offers a journey through contemporary creation. Since the 90s, three figures of French architecture have marked the history of art, Frederic Borel, Marc Barani and Jean-Marc Ibos and Myrto Vitart. They have shown the excellence of French creations in the world.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: The Museum of Fine Art in the city of Montpellier, in the South of France, bears the name of Francois-Xavier Fabre (1766-1837), who left his personal collection to his native town. Here you can admire the picture “Vertumnus and Permona” by Jean Ranc or “The Women of Algiers” by Delacroix. The collection includes works by the Montpellier painter Jean-Frederic Bazille, such as his “View of a Village”, and above all paintings by Gustave Courbet, including the famous “Bonjour Monsieur Courbet”. Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: Built in 1926, the Bauhaus in Dessau remains Walter Gropiuss major work. One of the most famous buildings of 20th century architecture. Not only architect of the Bauhaus, he is also the director of this "School of Creation": the Bauhaus, both patron and client. It is the separate needs of the school that determine the design of the buildings, which are connected to each other. To each space its coherence, its own existence. Gropius opts for a nesting system: he designs an asymmetrical building, giving it a floating character, playing on different masses and different heights, advancing into space. As if in extension. The desire for transparency is omnipresent. The curtain wall of glass that clings to the three floors of the main parallelepiped is the most accomplished mark of it. The interior decoration is designed and built by the Bauhaus students. It is a total architecture for Gropius. Rationalizing construction, producing more economical and functional housing will remain the a.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: The spectacular sculptures and paintings of Michelangelo seem so familiar to us, but what do we really know about this renaissance genius? Who was this ambitious and passionate man? A virtuoso craftsman, Michelangelo’s artistry is evident in everything he touched. Beautiful and diverse works such as the towering statue of David, the deeply moving Pietà in the Papal Basilica of St. Peter and his tour-de-force, the Sistine Chapel ceiling still leave us breathless today.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: « Les Tournesols » sont parmi les tableaux de Van Gogh les plus celèbres. Le musee Van Gogh à Amsterdam a consacre une exposition à ces œuvres et « Exhibition on screen », qui a eu un accès exclusif à l’evenement, nous guide à travers l’exposition pour enqueter sur les mystères qui entourent ces tableaux. Le film nous amènera egalement à Tokyo, Philadelphie, Londres et Munich pour suivre les 5 principales œuvres de l’exposition.

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, nous nous rendons dans la banlieue Sud de Paris. C’est dans un quartier tranquille que l’artiste Elias Crespin se rend chaque matin pour rejoindre son studio. L’artiste d’origine venezuelienne, y a etabli ses quartiers depuis près de 5 ans et y façonnent ses creations un peu particulières. Ses sculptures sont composees de figures geometriques simples, des lignes, triangles, carres ou cercles, qui flottent dans l’espace suspendus à des fils presque invisibles.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In this episode we will meet Kelsey Mc Neal, a photographer who specializes in film and television photography. He has been the director of photography on numerous series such as Scandal, Greys Anatomy, How I met your mother, and in movies with MARVEL productions, as well as on most of the FOX and ABC productions.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In this episode, well be talking with Jennifer Khordi, photographer. She is a former computer professional from the Bronx. She started with street photography in the late 1980s and then moved into travel and portrait photography. She has spent the last few years photographing the moon, the Milky Way and New York City.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Les animatrices vedettes Nicki Chapman et Jules Hudson sechappent à la campagne pour partir à la chasse aux antiquites avec Natasha Raskin et Phillip Serrell. Cest une bataille filles contre garçons, chaque equipe disposant de 400 £. Le voyage commence à Wormsley, dans le Herefordshire, puis les deux equipes se dirigent vers le pays de Galles et lOxfordshire, avant de finir à North Finchley, à Londres, pour une vente aux enchères.En chemin, les filles rencontrent un fabricant de sabots qui sculpte les chaussures à la main. Pendant ce temps, les garçons se rendent au Herefordshire Light Infantry Museum pour en apprendre davantage sur l’implication du regiment à Gallipoli.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Les coachs vocaux et couple marie David et Carrie Grant echangent lharmonie vocale contre une competition acharnee dantiquites. Avec laide des experts Will Axon et Mark Stacey, le couple decouvre des objets inattendus à vendre lors d’une vente aux enchères dans la campagne du Norfolk.David fait une halte sur un terrain dherbe en plein cœur de Cambridge, où aujourdhui les enfants jouent et les chiens se promènent, mais qui etait en realite le berceau du football. Pendant ce temps, Carrie decouvre comment Letchworth Garden City a declenche une revolution dans la conception des villes.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Goya : visions de chair et de sang
programme.desc: Francisco Goya, considere comme le fondateur de l’art moderne, est l’artiste espagnol le plus acclame. En plus d’observer avec talent la vie et le passe mouvemente de l’Espagne, c’est un portraitiste doue et un commentateur social par excellence. Avec Goya, l’art du portrait atteint de nouveaux sommets. Cette exposition majeure de la National Gallery de Londres remet son genie en lumière. À travers une formidable collection d’oeuvres uniques et de lettres de Goya, nous analysons l’homme lui-meme et le monde qu’il peignait.

programme.title: Secret treasures
programme.desc: The National Assembly, the Thiers Library or the Custodia Foundation, when you think of these important places in the history of France, you dont think that they can contain real treasures. We will prove you are wrong! Experts, historians, will guide us and make us discover the secrets of these incredible places.

programme.title: Sunday Rendezvous: Follow the Guide!
programme.desc: Every first sunday of the month, Museum TV puts a spotlight on an artist, an artistic current or a famous work of art! In May, well take you behind the curtains for a very special museum tour...

programme.title: Getting Frank Gehry
programme.desc: Drawing on a lifes work defined by controversial and ground-breaking ideas, the worlds greatest architect has inaugurated his first Australian building - and debate still rages over whether it is eyesore or icon. Our film follows the drama as Gehry’s vision for this commission is realized. Through the construction of this building, we examine his challenging work over a period of forty years.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Pablo Picasso est l’un des plus grands artistes au monde, et jusqu’à sa mort en 1973, il etait le plus prolifique. Comment tout a commence ? Comment s’est construit Picasso ? Après avoir ete trop longtemps ignorees, il est temps de se concentrer sur les jeunes annees de l’artiste et son education qui lui ont permis d’accomplir l’extraordinaire. Trois villes ont joue un rôle-cle : Malaga, Barcelone et Paris. "Le jeune Picasso" les traverse et explore leur influence sur l’artiste, en analysant des œuvres specifiques de ses debuts.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: How can desire be expressed in painting? Over the centuries, numerous artists have passionately sought to express or arouse such a sentiment. Take a look at paintings such as “Rolla” by Gerveix representing the total abandonment of the woman’s body. The story of “Danae”, painted by Corregio, provides a mythological excuse for depicting the female body naked. As for Fragonard, he succeeded in reproducing the acme of desire between man and woman as they struggle around the “Bolt”. Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Rembrandt est largement considere comme le plus grand peintre Neerlandais du 17ème siècle. Il est maître dans l’usage des lumières, particulièrement dans la technique du clair-obscur, c’est un dessinateur exceptionnellement talentueux. Le travail de Rembrandt a ete considerablement influence par les evenements dramatique de sa vie ( La mort de sa femme, sa faillite financière, etc..). Dans cette exposition vous allez decouvrir ses peintures les plus celèbres exposes au Louvre, comme « Bethsabee au bain tenant la lettre de David » ,mais egalement expose à Mauritshuis avec « La Leçon danatomie du docteur Tulp » ou encore ces fameux autoportraits.Bonne visite !

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: François Boucq draws from morning to night in his studio, alone, as if he wanted to be more closely involved with his characters, moving from the savagery of the American West to the diplomacy of the Vatican, from the urban jungle to the news of the daily press. He has been drawing for 40 years with realism, with a precise and detailed line, a graphic finesse that makes him one of the undisputed masters of todays comics.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of an Italian painter, Titien. You will discover his labour with Pastoral concert, The resurrection of Christ or Venus with organist.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Georges Seurat. You will discover his labour with « Ile de France » landscape, Study for « a Sunday afternoon at the grande jatte », Study for « La grande jatte ».

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: Reforestation, sustainable fishing, and turtle protection illustrate Costa Rica’s commitment to sustainability. These community efforts restore ecosystems while improving quality of life. This episode shows how harmony between humans and nature supports collective health.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.sub-title: Sardinia - Taste of Life Part II
programme.desc: Why does Sardinia stand alone as Europe’s Healthiest Community? This Mediterranean island is home to some of the world’s longest-living people, thanks to its unique blend of tradition, environment, and lifestyle. Sardinians embrace a diet of fresh, local produce and rich olive oils, shared in the company of family and friends, strengthening social bonds essential to well-being.The island’s rugged terrain promotes an active lifestyle, while age-old traditions provide a sense of purpose and balance. Sardinia teaches that longevity isn’t just about diet or exercise—it’s about living simply, valuing community, and finding joy in life’s everyday moments.

programme.title: The Wonderful World of Crafting
programme.desc: The series begins with three makers taking their items to Clare Priory Craft Fair in Suffolk. Heather quit her job to devote her time to making clay fantasy figures, so she needs to start making her hobby pay. John rents a huge studio full of quilting machines and fabrics to realise his passion, and Toni is devoted to crochet.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.sub-title: Sardinia - Taste of Life Part II
programme.desc: Sardinia teaches powerful lessons about community, social connection, and good food, rooted in centuries of tradition. The island’s lifestyle is built on a deep connection to the land, from growing and preparing fresh, local ingredients to sharing meals that strengthen bonds. Sardinians embrace the concept of producing their own food, fostering a system of giving and receiving that reinforces community ties.Guided by Dr. Ivo Pirisi, we uncover how these practices contribute to longevity. From making nutrient-rich breads with mother yeast passed down for decades to preparing meals with seasonal produce and homemade wines, the focus is on quality, sustainability, and togetherness. Sardinia’s traditions remind us that health and happiness thrive in simplicity, cooperation, and a deep respect for the land and one another.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.desc: Strengthen and detoxify with this powerful and challenging sequence. Unravel to Reveal is a process of exploring the gift of presence in order to find what gifts the body can reveal. Be with your breath and let the process unfold.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of "Home Training" is centered around a full-body workout, with the first block dedicated to the lower body and the second to the upper body. Guillaume and Sabrina introduce the superset method, which involves working antagonist muscles like the quadriceps and glutes. This approach alternates between an active muscle and a passive muscle, increasing the intensity of the exercises. Commonly used in weight training, this method is perfect for intensifying muscle work while diversifying the effort. Expect a dynamic and demanding session to engage your muscles deeply.

programme.title: Pilates
programme.desc: Stay in shape with our pilates courses!

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.desc: With an intense focus on the breath, Warrior Wisdom creates a moment of presence that is attentive, aware and complete. Moving slowly with the breath allows a deeper connection of mind and body that will leave you with greater confidence and strength.

programme.title: Spiritual Sports
programme.desc: Nurture the body AND the mind with Spiritual Sports.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of "Home Training" is dedicated to a thighs-abs-glutes workout, focusing on effectiveness and intensity. Guillaume and Sabrina introduce exercises that quickly engage the quadriceps, with movements to intensify the muscle work. The buildup of lactic acid in the muscles is expected but is part of the strengthening process. Variations throughout the session help maintain constant effort and target different areas. Get ready for a dynamic and challenging workout to tone the lower body.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie takes us on a journey of spices and aromatic plants. Spices are a call to travel, to faraway lands and to the unknown. On her journey, Julie will introduce us to the famous black pepper.

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.desc: Strengthen and detoxify with this powerful and challenging sequence. Unravel to Reveal is a process of exploring the gift of presence in order to find what gifts the body can reveal. Be with your breath and let the process unfold.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Lets hit the roads of France to discover shellfish. Well visit Brittany, then the Normandy coast where fishing is the regional sport, and Corsica, where the far northeast of the island lives to the rhythm of lobster. Julie takes us to cook lobster, crab with a very special recipe, and langoustines.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: This week, Kenelm, Aurelie, Virginie and Fred are the candidates for the title of Ace of the Week. But before they go head-to-head on their building sites, our budding decorators have a meeting in the Brussels workshop. Its a chance for them to gauge their opponents. On this first day of competition, Kenelm takes to the stage. At just 24, this Brussels native is the youngest decorator of the week. With a degree in architecture, he has developed a style all his own. An adept of minimalism and respectful of materials above all else, he hides another secret weapon...

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie nous emmène en Bretagne sud et plus precisement dans le quartier maritime du Guilvinec pour faire avec vous la route du poisson depuis les filets jusqu’à vos assiettes. Le Guilvinec a beau etre le premier port de peche artisanale français, tous les bords de mers de l’hexagone reservent de bons produits de saison. Julie remonte donc en voiture pour decouvrir dans le sud un certain nombre de poissons d’elevage dans une ferme aquacole en Mediterranee, tout en cuisinant le bar à Noirmoutier, la lotte dans le Nord et meme le cabillaud dans l’immense marche de Rungis. Julie a challenge le Chef Olivier Bellin installe à Plomodiern dans le Finistère, pour qu’il cuisine un poisson meconnu : la vieille.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Virginie, a 54-year-old woman from Nantes, is brimming with ideas, and shes determined to prove that shes the Deco Master! Her brain is constantly bubbling. In fact, her explosive temperament prompted Virginie to quit her previous job to concentrate on her passion. While her new career forces her to think in terms of organization rather than decoration, this doesnt stop Virginie from having a very assertive style, and Virginie has more than one string to her bow.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Nous entamerons ce periple près de la Rochelle pour en apprendre un peu plus sur l’elevage des fameuses moules de bouchot mais aussi une technique bien particulière pour les cuisiner. Nous partirons ensuite pour un tour de France des meilleures huîtres : direction Cancale, Arcachon, Montpellier et enfin Oleron pour connaître les differentes methodes d’elevage et s’y retrouver un peu plus parmi toutes les espèces de l’hexagone. Julie cuisinera une fricassee de berniques, les petits chapeaux chinois qui recouvrent les rochers du littoral mais aussi des palourdes roses meconnues du grand public. Nous poursuivrons notre route dans le Finistère pour rencontrer Sylvain, le seul eleveur d’ormeau du pays puis à Meru où se trouve encore des ateliers magnifiant ce sublime materiau. Le Chef Jean-Marie Baudic nous cuisine les coquilles Saint-Jacques comme personne.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: If youre a nature enthusiast and a fan of outdoor cooking, the upcoming season is perfect for barbecue enthusiasts! Our journey will take us to Aube, nestled in the heart of the Brevonnes forest, and then to the Massif des Bauges, where grilling and snow create a unique combination. Afterward, well explore the Libournais region, where well uncover cooking techniques that make use of vine shoots, which are plentiful in the area. Just a short distance from the vineyards, well arrive at another corner of Gironde, the Blaye region, where the cooking method remains consistent but features a distinctly local ingredient: eel.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, Julie takes us down a different kind of yellow-brick road, one that tastes of childhood and gourmet delights: the road of sweets. France may be famous for its gastronomy, but its not to be outdone when it comes to pastries and confectionery - quite the opposite. “Betises” from Cambrai, "Berlingots” from Carpentras, "Calissons” from Aix-en-provence, every region in France has its own sweet or confectionery.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Honey was the first sweet condiment in history! It has also been known and consumed as a remedy since Antiquity. In France, we find an infinite variety of honey: acacia, chestnut, fir, rosemary, orange, spruce, oak, linden or lavender... Well cross forests, fields and even towns, as bees also forage in urbanized areas. Well then cook up emblematic recipes like Vercel gingerbread. Finally, well discover the European dark bee. Protecting this 80-million-year-old bee has become the spearhead of some passionate beekeepers.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, were off to discover summer fruits, which are harvested from June to August: peaches, melons, strawberries, raspberries... Well then head to the cherry capital, Ceret, and cook blueberries, strawberries and an apricot charlotte.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie is offering you a trip to the south of France. Between the Rhone Valley and the Mediterranean, lets discover a fruit that is harvested in November: the olive.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: It is a mushroom that we are going to focus on today. A mushroom, or a black diamond, some would say: the truffle.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Aujourd’hui, les plus gourmands ne devraient pas etre deçus puisque c’est le chocolat qui est mis à l’honneur. Decouvert par les mayas il y 2500 ans et plus largement ensuite par les Aztèques, le chocolat fait partie aujourd’hui des produits preferes des français. Et qu’on ne s’y trompe pas : au meme titre que la cuisine a ses grands chef, le chocolat a aussi ses grands chocolatiers. Cote recettes, Julie fera decouvrir un gâteau qu’on ne fait qu’à Saint Émilien et qui associe le chocolat au macaron, avant de rejoindre le Pays Basque pour un dessert qui ne manque pas de piment. Nous grimperons ensuite en montagne à la rencontre d’une cuisinière d’origine suisse qui fait des pains au chocolat à sa façon. Enfin, vous verrez que le chocolat nous reserve de nombreuses surprises : il possède de nombreuses vertus et s’utilise aussi pour le bien etre.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Wellness cuisine is not synonymous with sadness and insipidity. It can be extremely gourmet, for a balanced way to indulge yourself. On this theme, Luana welcomes young wellness pastry chef Johanna Le Pape. Together, they will prepare recipes that are both tasty and perfectly balanced: corn pizza with vegetables and peach-cassis and verbena puffs...

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Leftovers often end up in the garbage can. But with a little thought, its easy to recycle them. This ecological and economical gesture can even delight our taste buds. Like us, Luana Belmondo hates throwing things away. She knows all about waste-free cooking and has mastered the art. She shows us how to reinvent boiled or steamed potatoes as something other than mashed potatoes. On the program: potato souffle with paprika and vegetable gratin with curry.

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.sub-title: Les Heros de la Nature : Senegal - Partie 2
programme.desc: For this new episode, Yann Arthus-Bertrand travels through Senegal to encounter men and women who dedicate their lives to preserving the environment. One of the major ecological stakes of the country is fishing and the mangrove ecosystem which, like in some many other parts of the world, faces major threats. Yann Arthus-Bertrand presents the struggle of Haidar El Ali, chosen among one of the world’s most active ecologists. He creates protected marine areas and reforests the disappeared mangrove of his country. He’s managed to convince thousands of Senegalese to plant with him ten million mangrove trees.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: We begin in Nendaz at the MAD Retreat, where Mike experiences aerial yoga, blending strength, flexibility, and mindfulness. From there, we visit a Kneipp hydrotherapy facility, learning how cold water, movement, and contrast therapy support circulation, resilience, and mental clarity.In the UNESCO Moorlands of Interlaken, we explore pristine alpine ecosystems and discover traditional herbal remedies passed down through Swiss generations. The episode culminates in a summit of a Swiss Alp with new friends, celebrating movement, nature, community, and the healing power of mountains.

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.desc: Canada is the second largest country in the world by land mass and contains amazing natural resources: 7% of the Earth’s drinking water is spread over the country’s thousands of lakes. Forests cover 45% of the territory. Yann Arthus-Bertrand goes off to discover these resources with those whose job it is to protect them. He takes a look at the ecological balance sheet of the world’s eighth-largest economic power.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: Reforestation, sustainable fishing, and turtle protection illustrate Costa Rica’s commitment to sustainability. These community efforts restore ecosystems while improving quality of life. This episode shows how harmony between humans and nature supports collective health.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.sub-title: Sardinia - Taste of Life Part II
programme.desc: Why does Sardinia stand alone as Europe’s Healthiest Community? This Mediterranean island is home to some of the world’s longest-living people, thanks to its unique blend of tradition, environment, and lifestyle. Sardinians embrace a diet of fresh, local produce and rich olive oils, shared in the company of family and friends, strengthening social bonds essential to well-being.The island’s rugged terrain promotes an active lifestyle, while age-old traditions provide a sense of purpose and balance. Sardinia teaches that longevity isn’t just about diet or exercise—it’s about living simply, valuing community, and finding joy in life’s everyday moments.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of "Home Training" focuses on a cardio session dedicated to strengthening the lower body. Guillaume and Sabrina introduce two main exercises, repeated with increasing intensity to engage both the cardio and muscles. Each block consists of 40 seconds of effort, with repetitions over several rounds to maximize endurance. They emphasize the importance of breathing properly throughout the session to supply oxygen to the muscles and avoid breath-holding. This dynamic session pushes participants to hang in there until the end for an intense and effective workout.

programme.desc: Stay in shape with our pilates courses!

programme.desc: Release and Restore is a sequence that brings you full circle through a series of poses that create space for reflection. You will release tension in your spine while attuning to the changes even the smallest actions create. What change will you make today?

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of "Home Training" offers a multi-sport session that combines several disciplines, such as boxing, hockey, and football. Guillaume and Sabrina invite participants to move actively, making the workout both fun and intense. The mix of sports helps work multiple muscle groups while keeping the session enjoyable. It’s a complete and interactive workout, perfect for getting active while having fun.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Today in Amiens, 35-year-old Aurelie enters the competition. Behind her apparent calm, she hides a volcano of inventiveness just waiting to explode. Her creativity is so overflowing that seven years ago, she quit her job as a laboratory technician to devote herself entirely to selling home-made decorative objects online. All homemade, but with a very particular style.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Now its Freds turn, a 35-year-old from Liège, to enter the competition. Underneath his serene exterior, this young educator for children with a passion for decoration hides a very speedy temperament. And to make the most of his hyperactivity, theres only one solution: decorating. Fred knows what he wants, both in his decorating style and in life.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Nous entamerons ce periple près de la Rochelle pour en apprendre un peu plus sur l’elevage des fameuses moules de bouchot mais aussi une technique bien particulière pour les cuisiner. Nous partirons ensuite pour un tour de France des meilleures huîtres : direction Cancale, Arcachon, Montpellier et enfin Oleron pour connaître les differentes methodes d’elevage et s’y retrouver un peu plus parmi toutes les espèces de l’hexagone. Julie cuisinera une fricassee de berniques, les petits chapeaux chinois qui recouvrent les rochers du littoral mais aussi des palourdes roses meconnues du grand public. Nous poursuivrons notre route dans le Finistère pour rencontrer Sylvain, le seul eleveur d’ormeau du pays puis à Meru où se trouve encore des ateliers magnifiant ce sublime materiau. Le Chef Jean-Marie Baudic nous cuisine les coquilles Saint-Jacques comme personne.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Its verdict time for Kenelm, Aurelie, Virginie and Fred. Our budding decorators are about to find out their opponents criticisms and receive their scores. What will the owners think of their freshly redecorated room? Who will be Valerie Damidots favorite? Who will walk away with the title of Deco Master and €2,000?

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Eating flowers might appear unconventional, but we often consume them without even realizing it. Consider artichokes, for instance : they are essentially large, unopened flowers. Capers are the preserved buds of flowers soaked in vinegar, and cloves are dried flower buds. We also find courgette flowers, saffron pistils, orange blossom water used to flavor pastries, and the violet sweets that evoke memories of our childhood. In addition to adding aesthetic appeal and providing a dose of vitamins to our plates, flowers elevate the flavors of a dish and can even serve as a vegetable substitute.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie takes us on a journey of spices and aromatic plants. Spices are a call to travel, to faraway lands and to the unknown. On her journey, Julie will introduce us to the famous black pepper.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Auxerre is cut by valleys whose best exposed slopes are home to vineyards. The meandering course of the Yonne runs vertically through this region. To the east of Auxerre, the Chablis region is rounded with hills. The vineyard, extending on both sides of the valley of the Serein. To the south, lined by the Nivernais canal, the upper Yonne valley attracts climbing enthusiasts and boaters, before being swollen by the waters of the Cure. The region is renowned throughout the world for the quality of its wines, particularly those of Chablis. Julie begins her journey in Auxerre and then proposes typical recipes from the area: croquignoles and cherry clafoutis.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: This week, it is 80 kms from the capital, in Fontainebleau, that Julie is putting down her bags. Fontainebleau, a name famous throughout the world, a magical name which evokes for some a forest, for others a castle, a name which still shines with its royal history. The forest of Fontainebleau has inspired the art world since the beginning of the 19th century. Landscape painters such as Corot and Millet drew inspiration for their works there. But Fontainebleau has many other treasures in its bag, and gastronomy is part of its heritage. This is what Julie will discover through three recipes: Quail with grapes, raspberry and poppy pie and crayfish grave.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie prend la direction de la Bourgogne pour decouvrir des races anciennes de volaille reintroduites en France grâce au travail de l’eleveur Fred Menager. Nous nous rapprocherons ensuite de l’Auvergne pour decouvrir comment est attribue le fameux Label Rouge et le rôle des organismes certificateurs … car il est important de savoir ce qui atterri dans nos assiettes. Julie se rendra aussi dans la Drôme pour cuisiner de la pintade avant de se diriger vers le Perigord pour preparer un civet de dindon. Installee dans sa petite Micheline, Julie remontera ensuite vers le centre pour decouvrir un etonnant fabricant de mouche qui utilise des plumes de coqs !

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Tendre et savoureux, l’agneau tient une place preponderante dans la cuisine festive mais aussi dans celle de tous les jours. Du Pays Basque au Cotentin en passant par Paris, Julie part donc sur les routes de France à la decouverte des differentes races et types delevage existant à travers le pays. Il faut dire que la France a lune des productions les plus variees au monde. Il existe plus dune quarantaine de races repertoriees en 5 categories : precoces, d’herbage, rustiques, merinos et laitières. Mais plus qu’à la race, c’est à la façon dont ils sont alimentes qui interesse les fins connaisseurs. Julie nous fait decouvrir ses producteurs et cuisiniers de ce met raffine !

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: C’est à nouveau sur les routes de France que l’on retrouve aujourd’hui Julie pour parler d’un produit incontournable des tables françaises : le fromage. Plus qu’un engouement gourmand, plus qu’une friandise de fins de repas, le fromage est associe à l’image de la gastronomie française, et d’ailleurs reconnu patrimoine immateriel par l’UNESCO. Les français ne s’y sont pas trompes : avec près de 1 000 varietes - des pâtes molles, aux pâtes cuites, persillees, ou encore pressees, et avec 45 Appellations, nous sommes les plus gros consommateurs de fromage au monde !

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: A good breakfast is a healthy, balanced meal made up of 5 energy-giving elements: protein, fiber, carbohydrates, healthy fats and hydration. Luana Belmondo offers us a healthy breakfast that will satisfy both salty and sweet palates: oatmeal, avocado and salmon, buddha bowl with chia seeds and seasonal fruit, and vegan panacakes.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana Belmondo and her Italian friend Alessandra Pierini are preparing a pasta party. Theyll be cooking pesto and sharing their tips on how to get it right. Theyll also be making pasta saporita, full of color and flavor!

programme.title: Tropical Home
programme.desc: For more than two decades, Japanese surfer Tsuyoshi Takahashi has played a role in championing the dreams of the Filipino surfers in La Union, Philippines. Upon deciding to call the town his home many years ago, he made it his mission to provide surfboards and share his knowledge and skills as an athlete with the local surfers. He also became instrumental in bringing them to international competitions and raising the Philippine flag on the global surfing stage. Tsuyoshi’s life story in La Union is a representation of how one can use his talent and passion to uplift the lives of others.

programme.title: Tropical Home
programme.desc: In 2010, Italian-Swiss Gianni Griffoni decided to call Siargao Island in the Philippines his home. Growing up, food played a big part in Giannis life. His mother is so passionate about cooking that when Gianni started to build his life in Siargao, food became the foundation of his entrepreneurial journey on the island.Today, Gianni owns one of the most successful restaurants in Siargao, serving Italian dishes that he learned from his mom. He is also able to pass on his love for food to his family and friends. Giannis life is a true testament that food has the power to bring people together.

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.desc: Canada is the second largest country in the world by land mass and contains amazing natural resources: 7% of the Earth’s drinking water is spread over the country’s thousands of lakes. Forests cover 45% of the territory. Yann Arthus-Bertrand goes off to discover these resources with those whose job it is to protect them. He takes a look at the ecological balance sheet of the world’s eighth-largest economic power.

programme.title: My Zen People
programme.desc: A former model and Sports News anchor, Hansen has drifted away from the limelight to focus on a personal journey. His Yoga trip began 10 years ago, after suffering a herniated disc injury. His experiences have taught him that the only way one can truly change the world is to raise the consciousness of humanity, and this actually starts within ourselves.

programme.title: Australias Land Of The Ancients
programme.desc: Vi legger ut på en fascinerende reise gjennom det eldgamle landskapet i det nordøstlige Australia – den mest biologisk mangfoldige regionen på kontinentet. Fra massive saltvannskrokodiller som speider etter sitt neste måltid til pungdyrmødre som beskytter ungene sine, avslører vi hvordan dyr overlever under de tøffe forholdene i et landskap i stadig endring.

programme.title: Utrolige australia
programme.desc: De lange strekningene med rikholdige habitater som finnes langs Australias ville kyst er hjemmet til noen av planetens mest magiske skapninger. I disse enorme kystområdene og sjøen finner vi episke migrasjoner, fascinerende parringsritualer og ekstreme kamper mellom rovdyr og bytte.

programme.title: Australias Wild Woodlands
programme.desc: Australias vidstrakte eukalyptusskoger huser et utrolig utvalg av arter som ikke finnes andre stedet i verden. Mange av disse eldgamle økosystemene har i stor grad forblitt uendret helt siden dinosaurenes tid, men nå er fremtiden usikker for flere arter. Vi avdekker hvordan klimaendringene endrer den sarte balansen for disse utrolige dyrene som lever i disse majestetiske skogene.

programme.title: Trekenguruer: Skogens spøkelser
programme.desc: En av Australias underligste skapninger, Lumholtz trekenguruer, er som spøkelser i skogene nord i Queensland. Vi vandrer gjennom villmarken i Atherton Tableland, for å få et innblikk i livene til disse sky klatrespesialistene.

programme.title: Jakten på kjempeblekkspruten
programme.desc: Kjempeblekkspruten er et av verdens mest mystiske dyr, og man har stort sett mislyktes i forsøkene på å finne og observere den i naturen. Men med nye kameraer og en målrettet etterforskning, er man sikker på at man nå leter på rett sted. Endelig kan vi kaste nytt lys over mysteriet om kjempeblekkspruten, og kanskje til og med se en.

programme.title: Utrolige australia
programme.desc: De lange strekningene med rikholdige habitater som finnes langs Australias ville kyst er hjemmet til noen av planetens mest magiske skapninger. I disse enorme kystområdene og sjøen finner vi episke migrasjoner, fascinerende parringsritualer og ekstreme kamper mellom rovdyr og bytte.

programme.title: Australias Wild Woodlands
programme.desc: Australias vidstrakte eukalyptusskoger huser et utrolig utvalg av arter som ikke finnes andre stedet i verden. programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: Pol-klanen installerer et nytt gjerde og drar til smådyrauksjonen.

programme.title: Dyrefikserne: Landsbygdas veterinærer
programme.desc: Kyllinger holder dr. Hodges og dr. Ferguson på tå hev. En drektig husky og en drektig dobermann kommer til klinikken, og begge trenger et akutt keisersnitt. En dyrehage trenger hjelp med å fastslå kjønnet på noen bevere de passer på. Valpen Titan blir diagnostisert med parvovirus og trenger desperat en blodtransfusjon. Da kommer dr. Hodges hund, Bane, til unnsetning. En kattunge kommer til klinikken etter at eieren har tråkket på den ved et uhell.

programme.title: Amerikas ville steder
programme.desc: Vi reiser fra sør til nord og utforsker de fjerneste avkrokene til Appalachian Trail og møter forskerne som jobber for å bevare området.

programme.title: Amerikas ville steder
programme.desc: Vi følger med JT Reynolds, Death Valleys store forkjemper, for å møte forskerne som jobber for å bevare det unike stedet.

programme.title: Kanalpause
programme.desc: Kanalen sendes for øyeblikket ikke.

programme.title: Ville Alaska
programme.desc: Den kuperte kysten til USAs største stat har et utrolig dyreliv. Når vinteren svinner, gjør dyrene det meste ut av den lyse sommeren.

programme.title: Dyrefikserne: Landsbygdas veterinærer
programme.desc: Kyllinger holder dr. Hodges og dr. Ferguson på tå hev. En drektig husky og en drektig dobermann kommer til klinikken, og begge trenger et akutt keisersnitt. En dyrehage trenger hjelp med å fastslå kjønnet på noen bevere de passer på. Valpen Titan blir diagnostisert med parvovirus og trenger desperat en blodtransfusjon. Da kommer dr. Hodges hund, Bane, til unnsetning. En kattunge kommer til klinikken etter at eieren har tråkket på den ved et uhell.

programme.title: Kanalpause
programme.desc: Kanalen sendes for øyeblikket ikke.

programme.title: Ville Alaska
programme.desc: Den kuperte kysten til USAs største stat har et utrolig dyreliv. Når vinteren svinner, gjør dyrene det meste ut av den lyse sommeren.

programme.title: Snow School
programme.desc: Når det snør hver eneste dag, stenger aldri skolen. Snørike områder kan gjøre livet tøft, men det er vanskelig å vokse opp uansett hvor man er. En hvalrossunge får svømmeundervisning av moren, unge røyskatter lærer å jakte gjennom lek, oterunger lærer å unngå rovdyr, ugleunger øver seg på å forlate redet og pingvinunger tar det store spranget. Dyreungene lærer hvordan de skal klare seg i verdens kaldeste klima takket være hjemmeundervisningen, foreldrene samt mye prøving og feiling.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Den elskede klinikk-huskatten, Tater, blir syk og teamet jobber sammen for å redde ham. Charles debuterer med en ny stil, dr. Pol behandler en stut som elsker å tygge ved og dr. Brenda tar seg av en labrador med mageproblemer. En nysgjerrig chihuahua spiser en giftig matbit, så dr. Lisa gir en den klissete motgift og dr. Nicole hopper inn for å redde en fødende geitemama.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Dr. Pol kjemper en kamp mot klokka for å redde en ku. En rekke krisetilfeller gjør dr. Pol opptatt på gårdene, mens veterinærteamet tar hånd om klinikken. Dr. Nicole blir tilkalt for å undersøke et reinsdyr, dr. Lisa fjerner en mistenkelig kul på en gjeterhund og dr. Brenda behandler en valp som har rast ned i vekt.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Flere kjæledyr har havnet i knipe i Michigan, så Pols veterinærklinikk må hjelpe dem. Dr. Pol fjerner pinnsvinpigger fra snuten til en mastiff, dr. Nicole trekker en meter med hyssing ut av magen til en katt og dr. Lisa fjerner fiskekroken som sitter fast i en hund. Dr. Pol rykker ut til en gård for å hjelpe en hest, mens dr. Brenda undersøker om en flokk med kyr er drektige.

programme.title: Return of the White Shark
programme.desc: Hvithaiene dukker opp i stadig større antall ved det populære feriestedet Cape Cod, der det i flere hundre år ikke var noen. Med fantastiske bilder undersøker man hvordan kystlandskapet har forandret seg med tiden og hvorfor det finnes rekordmange hvithaier her.

programme.title: Sharks of the North
programme.desc: Det blir sett flere og flere hvithaier i Atlanterhavet utenfor Canada, og marinbiolog Alanna Canaran drar ut for å avsløre gåtene rundt disse fantastiske skapningene. Canaran og teamet hennes kjemper for å finne sky haier og navigere farlige farvann for å samle uvurderlige data som forhåpentligvis kan bidra til at mennesker og hvithaier kan sameksistere fredfullt.

programme.title: Kanalpause
programme.desc: Kanalen sendes for øyeblikket ikke.

programme.title: Kannibalhai
programme.desc: Verdens fremste haiforskere leder en gransking av den fascinerende verdenen til kannibalhaier. Fra den 50 cm lange sigarhaien som river ut biter av hvithaien som er ti ganger så stor, til sandtigerhai-unger som angriper og spiser hverandre inne i mors mage. Stålsett deg til å se haier som du aldri har sett dem før.

programme.title: Super Reefs
programme.desc: I 2009 utforsket National Geographic Pristine Seas de sydlige Linjeøyene, og fant urørte korallrev, blomstrende økosystemer fulle av haier og fiskestimer. Men i 2015-16 drepte en uvanlig økning i havtemperaturen halvparten av korallene. Teamet til Pristine Seas reise tilbake i 2021, i håp om å se tegn på forbedring. Det de i stedet fant var den mest spektakulære gjenopprettingen av korallrev noensinne.

programme.title: Dyrefikserne: Landsbygdas veterinærer
programme.desc: På Critter Fixer Veterinary Hospital i det landlige Georgia eier og driver dr. Hodges og dr. Ferguson en livlig veterinærklinikk. Sammen med staben behandler de dyr i alle former og størrelser.

programme.title: Dyrefikserne: Landsbygdas veterinærer
programme.desc: Dyrlegene hos Dyrefikserne utfører et keisersnitt på en eggforstoppet trynesnok, og prøver å fjerne en svulst fra en murene… inne i noens stue! Dr, Hodges hjelper en parakitt som ikke kan gå, og Dr. Ferguson introduserer dyrlegeaspirantene for kunekunegriser som trenger viktige tester. Til sist hjelper teamet en hund som kan ha spist en tauleke.

programme.title: Dyrefikserne: Landsbygdas veterinærer
programme.desc: Veterinærene på klinikken må bruke all sin erfaring for å redde en elsket høne. Teamet møter en sjelden hunderase og kommer med en løsning på en sølete kattefiasko. Veterinærene tar imot alle slags pasienter, blant annet en skjeggagam, en Nyguinea-bløtskilpadde og hjelper en lokal bonde med å sette ut havabbor ved deres nye hjem.

programme.title: Dyrefikserne: Landsbygdas veterinærer
programme.desc: På Critter Fixer Veterinary Hospital i det landlige Georgia eier og driver dr. Hodges og dr. Ferguson en livlig veterinærklinikk. Sammen med staben behandler de dyr i alle former og størrelser.

programme.desc: Vi følger med JT Reynolds, Death Valleys store forkjemper, for å møte forskerne som jobber for å bevare det unike stedet.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: Budgivningen er intens på den store dyreauksjonen! Pol-familien jobber mot målet om å bringe sauer og kyr hjem til gården deres. Eventuelle dyr de vinner vil bli levert til gården i løpet av bare tre dager, så å få sauehytta ferdig i tide er preserende - og det er mye som gjenstår. I mellomtiden er Beth og Charles bekymret for den lave aktiviteten i bikubene deres.

programme.title: Worlds Weirdest: Høydepunkter
programme.desc: Enten de må unngå rovdyr eller takle ekstreme forhold har disse uvanlige blekksprutene, bisarre beverne og fantastiske fiskene utviklet merkelige strategier for å overleve.

programme.title: Amerikas ville steder
programme.desc: Canyonlands er en ukjent perle blant USAs nasjonalparker. Det ulendte terrenget er ikke bare vakkert, men også en historiebok.

programme.title: Amerikas ville steder
programme.desc: National Geographic blir med på en spennende reise over 445 kilometer for å utforske Grand Canyon og dens mysterier.

programme.title: USAs nasjonalparker
programme.desc: Vi reiser til de naturlige underverkene i Hawai’i Volcanoes nasjonalpark, et hellig land skapt av ild og sjø. Her finnes verdens mest unike samling av dyrearter. Vi ser hvordan de klarer seg i et landskap som stadig endres av de aktive vulkanene. Dette er det største og mest mangfoldige økosystemet blant Stillehavsøyene.

programme.title: Dyrefikserne: Landsbygdas veterinærer
programme.desc: Dyrlegene hos Dyrefikserne utfører et keisersnitt på en eggforstoppet trynesnok, og prøver å fjerne en svulst fra en murene… inne i noens stue! Veterinærene tar imot alle slags pasienter, blant annet en skjeggagam, en Nyguinea-bløtskilpadde og hjelper en lokal bonde med å sette ut havabbor ved deres nye hjem.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Dr. Pol ønsker et nytt føll velkommen til familien mens det varmere vårværet fører med seg flere krisesituasjoner. Dr. Brendas kne ryker mens hun redder ei merr. Dr. Pol rykker ut for å behandle fem kalver som sliter med å vokse. Dr. Nicole plukker fjær fra en nysgjerrig chihuahua, and dr. Lisa behandler en katt med ei blokkert blære.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Der er farsdag, og teamet er travelt når en valpetornado rammer klinikken. Dr. Pol behandler en påfugl med et skadet ben, og dr. Lisa opererer sår etter en hundekamp. Dr. Nicole redder ei kattunge på vei til jobb, og dr. Brenda oppdager flere byller på en katt. Borte fra klinikken legger Charles en plan for å hjelpe faren å slappe av og nyte dagen.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Den elskede klinikk-huskatten, Tater, blir syk og teamet jobber sammen for å redde ham. Charles debuterer med en ny stil, dr. Pol behandler en stut som elsker å tygge ved og dr. Brenda tar seg av en labrador med mageproblemer. En nysgjerrig chihuahua spiser en giftig matbit, så dr. Lisa gir en den klissete motgift og dr. Nicole hopper inn for å redde en fødende geitemama.

programme.title: USAs nasjonalparker
programme.desc: Big Bend nasjonalpark er et stort naturområde med fjell, ørken og elver i hjertet av Texas. Det var en gave til delstaten, og det har blitt til et fredet område for dyrelivet ved grensen i sør. I det unike og tøffe landskapet i Big Bend finner man flere arter av fugler, insekter og kaktus enn i noen annen nasjonalpark.

programme.title: USAs nasjonalparker
programme.desc: Badlands nasjonalpark er et land med robust skjønnhet som har eksistert i over 75 millioner år. Der innlandshavet ble et hav av gress, og utgjorde et av de mest truede økosystemene på jorden. Denne parken er også hjemsted for ikoniske steinspir, skåret fra bakken av vind og regn. Blant gresset og steinen er noen av Amerikas mest ikoniske arter som har utviklet seg sammen til fordel for hverandre.

programme.title: USAs nasjonalparker
programme.desc: Vi reiser til de naturlige underverkene i Hawai’i Volcanoes nasjonalpark, et hellig land skapt av ild og sjø. Her finnes verdens mest unike samling av dyrearter. Vi ser hvordan de klarer seg i et landskap som stadig endres av de aktive vulkanene. Dette er det største og mest mangfoldige økosystemet blant Stillehavsøyene.

programme.title: USAs nasjonalparker
programme.desc: Formet av naturen gjennom millioner av år: Grand Canyon er USAs mest kjente naturlige underverk, men få har sett noe annet enn den nordre siden.

programme.title: USAs nasjonalparker
programme.desc: Vær vitne til ville Yosemite – fra den frodige dalen til høye fjelltopper.

programme.title: USAs nasjonalparker
programme.desc: Våren i nasjonalparkene over hele USA kommer med nytt liv. Men selv i de vernede områdene byr veien til foreldreskap på utfordringer. I Katmai våkner en bjørnebinne fra vinterdvalen med tre nye unger. Hun må spise nok til å gi ungene melk, samtidig som hun beskytter dem mot trusselen fra en hannbjørn som ønsker å stifte familie. I Everglades blir en rosenskjestork-unge flygeferdig for tidlig og må overleve blant mangroverøttene mens søsknene er høyt oppe i reiret. Mor og far må jobbe dobbelt så hardt for å sikre at alle ungene overlever. I Yellowstone nyter bisonkalvene godt av beskyttelsen fra flokken. Men er det nok når ulvene nærmer seg?

programme.title: Amerikas farligste
programme.desc: De beste opptakene av de tøffeste dyrene i USA; som bjørn, ulv, puma, alligator og hvithodehavørn.

programme.title: Ville Mississippi
programme.desc: Langs Mississippi finner vi sultne ulver, iskalde rødgauper, stridende ørner og ugler som jakter i blinde.

programme.title: USAs nasjonalparker
programme.desc: Våren i nasjonalparkene over hele USA kommer med nytt liv. Men selv i de vernede områdene byr veien til foreldreskap på utfordringer.
